sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n87026" key="prodiasfi/ggw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προδια-σφίγγω</orth>, <sense id="n87026.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">tie up, compress first,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:45:17:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">45.17.7</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
